title: How To Design a Complete Brand Identity With AI (Best AI Logo Maker)
summary: Design.com is an AI platform that automates brand identity design including logo generation, brand kit creation, and template application. It enables users to create logos with plain-English edits, auto-apply brand colors across 500,000+ templates, and generate animated logos for social media within minutes without requiring design software.
writeup: This video walks through Design.com, an AI platform for building a complete brand identity: logos, brand kits, business cards, and social media templates. Designs can be edited with plain-English prompts, and a brand kit auto-applies across more than 500,000 templates without manual re-coloring. Additional features covered include animated logo generation for social media, background removal, and presentation making.
